suggestedMessage:
Hi! 👋

We noticed your last payment for flowOrder didn't go through — probably just a card issue. Your store is still active for now, but we wanted to give you a heads-up before anything gets interrupted.

Updating your payment info takes 30 seconds: [floworder.app/billing]

Let us know if you need any help!

---

مرحبا! لاحظنا إن الدفعة الأخيرة ما اتمت — على الأغلب مشكلة بطاقة بسيطة. متجرك لسه شغّال، بس حدّثنا تفاصيل الدفع قبل ما ينقطع الخدمة: [floworder.app/billing]

context.dmSentiment: none — no churn intent signals detected
context.note: Payment failure only. Customer is active (11 orders/30d). Tone: friendly heads-up, not alarming.
